MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-21-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN AND FAILED TO SHOW THAT NO EVENT OF DEFAULT AS DEFINED IN PARAGRAPH 19 OF THE DEED OF TRUST OCCURRED, E.G. 19.12. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17290007)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin E. Fusch (510-982-3001) of Law Offices of Jason W. Estavillo for Plaintiff Wetmore / Knobhill Partners LLC.
Cheryl C. Rouse (415-575-9444) of Rouse & Bahlert for Defendant TRA Wetmore LP.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. Both sides seeks clarification and submits to tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to sustain its burden and failed to show that no event of default as defined in paragraph 19 of the Deed of Trust occurred, e.g. 19.12. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.)
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
